titles: "11억 넣고 3억만 남았습니다" 절대 사면 안 되는 위험한 ETF 4가지
"ETF는 안전하다고요?" 워런 버핏도 절대 안 사는 ETF의 충격적인 비밀
"3배면 3배 벌겠지?" 8억 날린 투자자가 뒤늦게 알게 된 ETF의 구조
thumbnail_texts: 버핏도 안 사 + 매일 녹는 ETF

character_poses.1: INTRO-01 노트필기 — 분석가 똑똑이가 위험 ETF 종목 분석 메모
character_poses.2: REACT-04 깜짝 놀람 — -72% 손실 화면 충격 리액션
character_poses.3: INTRO-04 차트 설명 — 안전 ETF vs 위험 ETF 좌우 대조 안내

meta.design_rule: 상단 47% 이미지 + 하단 53% 순검정 (미리캔버스 노랑 2줄 텍스트 자리). 스컹크 벡터 스타일. 말풍선 라벨 자리는 이미지 상단 좌우 여백에 확보.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 1 — 스컹크 노트필기 분석가(INTRO-01). 좌측 정장+안경 똑똑이가 노트에 위험 ETF 종목명을 메모하며 진지한 표정. 우측에 SOXL·TQQQ·인버스 ETF 카드 3장이 빨간 글로우와 함께 떠 있고, 각 카드 위에 작은 하락 화살표. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes behind small round glasses, small pink nose, focused serious analyst expression, wearing a tiny dark navy business suit with red tie. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, half body shot, sitting at a small desk holding a notebook with one paw, the other paw writing with a pencil, brow slightly furrowed in concentration. On the RIGHT side: three glowing card-shaped ETF tickers floating in a fan layout, each labeled with stylized abstract chart symbols (no readable text), all bathed in deep crimson red glow with small downward red arrows above each card. A subtle red warning halo surrounds the cards. Background: deep navy blue gradient with faint financial grid pattern and soft red warning particles. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with strong red warning atmosphere.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 2 — 스컹크 깜짝 놀람(REACT-04). 좌측 똑똑이가 양 볼 잡고 충격, 작은 임팩트 라인 사방으로. 우측에 거대 스마트폰 화면이 빨간 급락 차트와 녹아내리는 ETF 동전 더미를 보여줌. 동전이 액체처럼 흘러내리는 시각화 — 변동성 손실(volatility decay) 비유. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, huge round eyes popping wide open in extreme shock, small pink nose, jaw dropped in disbelief, both paws pressed against the cheeks, small impact lines radiating outward. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, upper body shot. On the RIGHT side: a large stylized smartphone screen showing a steeply downward-plunging red candlestick chart, and beneath it a melting pile of golden coin shapes dripping and flowing downward like liquid wax, symbolizing leveraged ETF volatility decay. The melting coins drip with golden liquid trails. Bright red warning glow particles floating around the smartphone screen. Background: deep navy blue gradient with subtle red warning glow and faint financial grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-left corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with strong red shock atmosphere.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 3 — 스컹크 차트설명 안내자(INTRO-04). 중앙 똑똑이가 양손으로 좌우 두 차트를 가리킴. 좌측에는 빛나는 황금-에메랄드 안전 ETF 차트(우상향, 부드러운 곡선), 우측에는 빨간 톱니 모양 위험 ETF 차트(들쭉날쭉 변동성, 결국 하락). 가운데 황금 'VS' 구분선. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, confident teacher presenter expression. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk stands in the CENTER of the upper frame, full body shot, both paws extended outward — left paw pointing at the LEFT side, right paw pointing at the RIGHT side. On the LEFT side: a smooth upward-curving stock chart glowing with radiant gold and emerald green light, calm and steady, representing a safe index ETF. On the RIGHT side: a jagged red zigzag chart with extreme volatility spikes, ultimately ending in a sharp downward crash, representing a risky leveraged ETF. A bold golden 'VS' divider separates the two sides. Left side has bright emerald-gold glow conveying safety, right side has crimson red warning glow conveying danger. Background: deep navy blue gradient with subtle financial grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with clear safe-vs-risky contrast.
